sourceMovie.title: The Addams Family
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit The Addams Family for the same reason it broke through in 1991: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a fantasy rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Barry Sonnenfeld keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The comedy and fantasy blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Beetlejuice
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Addams Family clicked for you, Beetlejuice (1988) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and fantasy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Addams Family Values
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Addams Family clicked for you, Addams Family Values (1993) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and fantasy, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Addams Family clicked for you, The House with a Clock in Its Walls (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and fantasy, with unease that lingers after the credits. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Addams Family?
faq.answer: Try Beetlejuice, Addams Family Values, A Minecraft Movie—each shares DNA with The Addams Family while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Addams Family?
faq.answer: The Addams Family (1991) is best described as Comedy, Fantasy. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Addams Family part of a franchise?
faq.answer: Yes—it's part of the "Addams Family Collection" storyline. You can enjoy it standalone, but sequels and tie-ins build on characters and continuity established here.
